query: WITH entities AS (SELECT opened_as_of, id FROM core_fiscal_years WHERE (COALESCE((opened_as_of, id) < ($3, $2), $2 IS NULL)) ORDER BY opened_as_of DESC, id DESC LIMIT $1) SELECT i.id AS "entity_id: Repo__Id", e.sequence, e.event, CASE WHEN $4 THEN e.context ELSE NULL::jsonb END as "context: es_entity::ContextData", e.recorded_at FROM entities i JOIN core_fiscal_year_events e ON i.id = e.id ORDER BY i.opened_as_of desc, i.id desc, i.id, e.sequence
